result.summary: Found 2 issues: a major content/data mismatch and a minor text truncation in navigation.

issues.description: The 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section displays '0 Games' in the counter, but 6 exclusive game tiles are clearly shown below it. This is a data mismatch that creates confusion.
issues.suggestion: Update the counter to show the correct number of games (6) or verify that the games should be displayed if the count is actually 0.

issues.description: Navigation tab text is truncated - 'Hot Gam' appears to be cut off (likely 'Hot Games'). The text doesn't fit within the tab width on the current layout.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the tab width, reduce font size, or use abbreviations to ensure full text visibility without truncation in the navigation bar.
